/home/mm8/Documents/OS/MM8/MM8-OS/toolchain/i686-elf/bin/i686-elf-gcc -T /home/mm8/Documents/OS/MM8/MM8-OS/src/bootloader/stage2/linker.ld -nostdlib CMakeFiles/stage2.bin.dir/ctype.c.obj CMakeFiles/stage2.bin.dir/disk.c.obj CMakeFiles/stage2.bin.dir/fat.c.obj CMakeFiles/stage2.bin.dir/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/stage2.bin.dir/memory.c.obj CMakeFiles/stage2.bin.dir/stdio.c.obj CMakeFiles/stage2.bin.dir/string.c.obj CMakeFiles/stage2.bin.dir/utility.c.obj CMakeFiles/stage2.bin.dir/entry.asm.obj CMakeFiles/stage2.bin.dir/x86.asm.obj -o stage2.bin  -lgcc
